register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Join the community of future-shapers

archetype.title: What kind of futuremaker are you?
archetype.subtitle: Discover your archetype and find people like you

location.title: Where do you live?
location.subtitle: Your location helps find nearby communities
location.preciseLocationHelp: Precise location helps find nearby people but is only visible to registered users.

privacy.title: Privacy settings
privacy.subtitle: Choose what others can see
privacy.publicProfileDesc: Anyone can see your basic data
privacy.registeredProfileDesc: Only logged-in users can see your profile
privacy.connectionsProfileDesc: Only people you are connected with can see your profile

complete.subtitle: Registration successful
complete.emailSent: We sent a verification email to your address.

register.invitationCodePlaceholder: Code received from the inviting person

errors.emailExists: This email address is already taken.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. At least 8 characters, a number and a special character are required.

verification.subtitle: Check your email account

verification.demoInfoText: Since this is a demo version, the verification link (token) appears in the server console upon registration. In production, we send an email.

validation.minLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
validation.uppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter.
validation.lowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter.
validation.special: Password must include a special character.

validation.chooseSpokenLanguage: Choose at least one spoken language

agreements.title: I am a contributor
agreements.text: I am here to contribute to the community — and to receive from it too. I know this space is built from what we put into it.

agreements.title: I am open
agreements.text: I don't expect everyone to be like me. I believe diversity is a value.

agreements.title: I speak up when there is friction
agreements.text: If something is off, I don't suppress it. I speak up — politely and respectfully.

agreements.title: I share what I know
agreements.text: If I've learned something useful to others, I pass it on. Knowledge doesn't diminish when shared.

agreements.title: I respect others' time
agreements.text: If I'm unavailable or need to exit a process, I let people know in time instead of just disappearing.

agreements.title: I take responsibility
agreements.text: If I commit to something, I do it. If I promise a resource, I keep my promise.

agreements.title: I accept the current Charter
agreements.text: The Charter is the governance boundary for participation and amendment.

stage1.title: Create account
stage1.subtitle: This is the foundation. Everything else comes after.
stage1.invitationCodePlaceholder: Invitation code (optional) — no code needed to register; log in is available only after admin approval

stage2.title: Our framework
stage2.subtitle: Not rules. Principles by which we hold this space together.
stage2.timestampNotice: The time of acceptance will be recorded.

stage2_5.title: Where are you now?
stage2_5.subtitle: A few questions so the system doesn't ask for things that aren't relevant yet.
stage2_5.q1_focus: 1. What is the main focus of your current change work?
stage2_5.q2_activity: 2. How active are you in change work?
stage2_5.q3_project: 3. Do you currently have an active project, organization, or movement?
stage2_5.q4_systemic: 4. Do you work on systemic change, including inner work, theory of change, research, frameworks, adoption, and implementation across social, environmental, legal, or related domains?

stage3.title: Your public face
stage3.subtitle: What will the community see of you? (You can change anything later.)
stage3.mottoHint: Not the job title. Something truer than that. (Max 140 chars.)
stage3.mottoPlaceholder: E.g.: Permaculture designer in the Hudson Valley
stage3.bioHint: Who are you? What things do you find important? What are you looking for now?
stage3.communityHint: If you're already a member of a community (or are founding one now), find it here.
stage3.cityNudge: Providing your city helps local communities find you.

locationPrecision.label: Location precision on the map

country.label: Country
country.example: Hungary only; marker is placed around the country center.

exact.label: Precise
exact.example: Exact selected place; coordinates only, no address stored.

locationPrecision.cityRequired: Choose a city from the list to use city-level map precision.
locationPrecision.exactRequired: Choose a place from the list to use precise map coordinates.

stage4.title: Knowledge & Learning
stage4.subtitle: What do you bring? What are you looking for?
stage4.skillsLabel: What are you good at / what do you offer?
stage4.learningLabel: What are you learning / growing in?
stage4.mainCausesLabel: Your main social causes (Choose up to 3)
stage4.interestedCausesLabel: Your interests (What other causes interest you? Max 10)
stage4.soughtWorkLabel: What type of work are you looking for now? (L4+)
stage4.archetypesTitle: What is your role in change?
stage4.archetypesHint: Choose at least 1 (max 3). This is your base identity in the network.
stage4.protectionNeedsHint: There are collaborations that place asymmetric burden on one party. What type of structural network do you need for your operation to remain sustainable?

LOCAL_PRACTITIONER.name: Community Actor
LOCAL_PRACTITIONER.desc: You work directly in the local community.

NETWORK_WEAVER.name: Network Weaver
NETWORK_WEAVER.desc: You build connections between people and organizations.

INSTITUTIONAL_CHANGEMAKER.name: Institutional Reformer
INSTITUTIONAL_CHANGEMAKER.desc: You change things from within existing institutions.

GLOBAL_AMPLIFIER.name: Global Amplifier
GLOBAL_AMPLIFIER.desc: You amplify causes, ideas, and movements.

RESOURCE_MOBILIZER.name: Resource Mobilizer
RESOURCE_MOBILIZER.desc: You channel resources, capital, and tools to the right places.

INNOVATION_CATALYST.name: Innovation Catalyst
INNOVATION_CATALYST.desc: You create new solutions and prove with experiments.

SYSTEM_DISRUPTOR.name: System Disruptor
SYSTEM_DISRUPTOR.desc: You expose system failures and force new thinking.

STRATEGIC_ADVISOR.name: Strategist
STRATEGIC_ADVISOR.desc: You create vision and provide professional guidance.

stage4_5.title: Community Archetype (CHANGEMAP 2.0)
stage4_5.subtitle: Not every space is right for every person. What kinds of communities resonate with you?
stage4_5.q1_roles: 1. Your role in the network. Who are you most? (max 2)
stage4_5.q2_internalExternal: 2. Inner ↔ Outer. How do you want to change the world?
stage4_5.q3_secularSpiritual: 3. Secular ↔ Spiritual. What is your relationship with spirituality?
stage4_5.q4_decisionMaking: 4. Decision making. In which system do you work best?
stage4_5.q5_comfort: 5. Comfort level. What living conditions can you sustain long-term?
stage4_5.q6_presence: 6. Type of community presence (L3+). How do you imagine participation?
stage4_5.revealDescription: Based on your answers, this archetype fits you best. The system will use this to recommend communities and projects.
stage4_5.optionalHint: This step is optional — you can skip it and fill it in later.
stage4_5.skipButton: Skip for now — I will fill it in next time

resourceSharing.label: How would you share resources with a community?

socialIntimacy.label: How do you set boundaries in a community?

stage5.title: Functional context
stage5.subtitle: What energizes you? What drains you? Where are you now?
stage5.q1_lastEffort: What are you putting the most energy into lately?
stage5.q2_outsideRole: Beyond what you're paid for (or feel obligated to do) — what do you do?
stage5.energyTitle: Energy Balance: What fills you up and what drains you?
stage5.energyHint: Click once for energizing, second time for draining, third time back.
stage5.offerTitle: One sentence — what do you offer now?
stage5.offerPlaceholder: E.g. "Looking for a project where facilitation is needed..."

modes.BUILDING_DESC: Starting something new, looking for specific functions

stage5_5.title: RDG Areas
stage5_5.subtitle: Regenerative Development Goals. In which areas do you want to achieve systemic change?
stage5_5.q1_main: 1. In which area do you have the GREATEST professional expertise / influence?
stage5_5.q2_interested: 2. Which areas are you still actively interested in / would you get involved in?
stage5_5.q3_project: 3. What specific sub-project / mission is driving your focus in this area? (L5+)
stage5_5.q3_placeholder: E.g.: Restoration of ecological corridors in the Danube-Drava region...
stage5_5.q4_partnership: 4. Who should you partner with most to move forward? (L5+)
stage5_5.q5_risk: 5. What existential risk (X-Risk/S-Risk) do you consider most critical right now? (L5+)

intro.title: Why are we here?
intro.description: This platform is not just another social media. We designed it to connect system-level change makers — transparently and functionally.

stage6.title: Depth & Context
stage6.subtitle: Optional — but helps create better matches.
stage6.avoidTitle: What tasks would you rather pass on? (No need to explain why — just mark them)
stage6.projectTitle: Is there a project you're currently working on? (optional)
stage6.projectPlaceholder: Short description — what is it, what's it called, what is it about?
stage6.momentTitle: What are you most focused on right now? (choose what resonates)

stage6_5.title: Activity Profile
stage6_5.subtitle: L4+ level: Don't say who you are, say what you do day by day.
stage6_5.q1_activities: 1. What do your DAYS consist of most right now?
stage6_5.q2_desired: 2. What would you LIKE to do instead (or in addition)?
stage6_5.q3_skills: 3. What skills have you developed / acquired in your work that could be replicated? (L5+)
stage6_5.skipText: This stage at your current level (L{{level}}) is not yet required. Click to continue.

card0.title: This is not a directory
card0.text: You're not here to be found. You're here to find others — and meet on what truly matters.

card1.title: Your profile changes with you.
card1.text: What you showed now is not set in stone. As you change, your presence can change too. This interface helps you see where you are in your processes.

card2.title: Matches are invitations
card2.text: This is not an obligation, just an opportunity. If you find someone, it's an invitation — into connection, a project, a conversation.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.stage4_skills: Add at least one thing you're good at / offer.
errors.stage4_learning: Add at least one thing you're learning.
errors.stage4_causes: Choose at least one main social cause.
errors.stage5_functions: Mark at least one energizing function.
errors.stage5_5_main: Please select your main focus area in point 1.
errors.stage5_5_l5: Please complete all L5+ level (questions 3-5) required fields.
errors.spokenLanguages: Choose at least one spoken language
errors.mottoMin: Motto must be at least 5 characters.
errors.bioMin: Introduction must be at least 10 characters.
errors.timezoneRequired: Timezone is required when city is skipped.

lean.quote: "Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it's the only thing that ever has." — Margaret Mead

step1.title: The Threshold
step1.subtitle: Join a community of committed changemakers.
step1.optionalInviteCode: (optional) Registering without one is allowed; sign in remains pending until admin approval.

step2.title: Check your inbox
step2.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
step2.instruction: Click the link in the email to continue. It expires in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if you do not see it.

step3.title: Your identity
step3.subtitle: Almost there — set your name and password.
step3.sessionExpiredMessage: Your secure registration session has expired. Enter your email address and we will send a fresh continuation link.
step3.resendSuccess: We sent a new continuation email. Check your inbox.
step3.cookieMissingMessage: Your browser did not keep the secure registration cookie. Continue in the same browser or private window, allow essential cookies, then use your email address below to send a fresh continuation link.

step4.title: Profile trust
step4.subtitle: Add enough public context for people to recognize a real person behind the account.
step4.photoHelp: A clear profile photo is required. It stays editable later.
step4.bioPlaceholder: Share who you are, what you care about, and what kind of change work connects you to this map.
step4.contextHelp: Add at least one: organization name, website, or social link.
step4.organizationDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional short organization or project description

validation.photo: Upload a profile photo to continue.
validation.bio: Bio must be between 20 and 500 characters.
validation.context: Add at least one context signal.
validation.url: Use a valid http or https URL.

pendingApproval.title: Pending admin approval
pendingApproval.message: Your registration is complete. An admin must approve your account before you can sign in.

welcome.week1Task: Take a breath and look around. Explore the platform. When you are ready, complete your public profile so others can find you.
welcome.registrationTask: Finish the remaining registration steps before using the dashboard. This keeps agreements, assessment, causes, skills, and matching activation complete before the app opens.

errors.tokenExpired: The verification link has expired. Please start registration again.
errors.invalidToken: Invalid verification link. Please start registration again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please start registration again.

betaNotice.title: Beta Testing in Progress
betaNotice.message: This software is currently undergoing beta testing. Data loss and unexpected issues may occur. Please help us improve by reporting any problems you encounter.
betaNotice.contact: Report issues with the Feedback button in the bottom right corner or if it's not possible then please send an email to changemappers@pm.me

step5.title: Agreements & Your Level
step5.subtitle: Commit to our community principles and tell us where you are in your changemaking journey.
step5.timestampNotice: The time of your acceptance will be recorded.
step5.q_ecoCommunity: Are you seeking an ecological community where you live?
step5.q_intentionalCommunity: Are you seeking / organizing an intentional living community?
step5.q_highStakesProject: Do you have an ongoing social project which has high stakes to your community and to your own life and you need immediate help?
step5.q_strictNoRomance: You want to signal not to receive any romantic messages at all
step5.q_strictNoRomanceWarning: (Violations of this request will result in permanent ban for offenders)
step5.q_ecoCommunityHelp: Choose this if you want nearby ecological living options, land-based community, or local place-based connections to be part of matching.
step5.q_intentionalCommunityHelp: Choose this if you are looking for, founding, or coordinating a shared living community with explicit agreements and governance.
step5.q_highStakesProjectHelp: Choose this when the project is urgent, consequential, and personally demanding, so the platform can treat support needs as higher priority.

step6.title: Activate matching
step6.subtitle: A short matching core. These answers give you useful recommendations instead of generic browsing.
step6.offerPlaceholder: Add another offer, e.g. conflict mediation
step6.needTitle: What you need or want to learn
step6.needPlaceholder: Add another need, e.g. funding strategy
step6.validation: Choose one to three role labels, two offers, two needs, one cause or RDG domain, one thing you carry, and your availability.
step6.specialCategoryConsent: I explicitly consent to Changemappers using these optional matching answers, which may reveal sensitive personal context, to generate local recommendations. I can modify these answers later in my user profile settings and fine-tune my privacy settings.
step6.seedPlaceholder: A question, perspective, skill, local pattern, resource, or offer you can bring into a first exchange.
step6.informedChoiceBody: These answers help Changemappers suggest people, causes, and communities that may fit your current situation. They are not permanent labels.
step6.informedChoiceMatching: Between projects and Starting are normally matchable; Delivering is matchable but lower priority; Reflecting and Resting protect your attention and are not surfaced as new recommendations.
step6.informedChoiceProfile: You can edit your role labels, offers, needs, cause focus, and availability later from your profile settings.
step6.informedChoicePrivacy: You can fine-tune profile, search, map, matching, sensitive matching, and other privacy controls from privacy settings.
step6.helpLink: Open the full help page for more context.

fullGate.title: Confirm registration email
fullGate.subtitle: Enter your email before account details.
fullGate.checkEmailMessage: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.

magic.subject: Your Changemappers login link
magic.title: Sign in to Changemappers
magic.intro: Click the button below to sign in. This link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
magic.ignore: If you did not request this link, you can safely ignore this email.
magic.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Changemappers password
passwordReset.title: Password reset
passwordReset.intro: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password.
passwordReset.expiry: This link expires in 60 minutes and can only be used once.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request this reset, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:

leanVerification.subject: Confirm your email address - Changemappers
leanVerification.title: Welcome to Changemappers
leanVerification.quote: "Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it is the only thing that ever has." - Margaret Mead
leanVerification.body: Confirm your email address with the button below. The link is valid for 24 hours.
leanVerification.ignore: If you did not start this registration, you can ignore this email.
leanVerification.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:

leanReminder.subject: Finish your Changemappers registration
leanReminder.title: Finish your Changemappers registration
leanReminder.intro: You started creating a Changemappers account but have not finished it yet.
leanReminder.body: Click below to continue. This continuation link is valid for 24 hours.
leanReminder.deletionByDate: If you do not finish by {{date}}, this unfinished registration will be deleted.
leanReminder.deletionAfterWindow: If you do not finish within 7 days of starting, this unfinished registration will be deleted.
leanReminder.ignore: If you did not start this registration, you can ignore this email.
leanReminder.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:

invite.subject: {{inviterName}} invited you to Changemappers
invite.title: Invitation to Changemappers
invite.intro: {{inviterName}} invited you to join the Changemappers community.
invite.codeIntro: The invitation is valid for 7 days. Use this code during registration:
invite.ignore: If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

inactivityWarning.subject: Your Changemappers account will become inactive in {{days}} days
inactivityWarning.title: Keep your Changemappers account active
inactivityWarning.intro: Your account has been inactive for a while. If there is no authenticated activity, it will be marked inactive on {{date}}.
inactivityWarning.action: Sign in or use Changemappers within the next {{days}} days to keep the account active.
inactivityWarning.grace: Inactive accounts are erased after a further 30-day grace period if there is no activity.
inactivityWarning.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:
inactivityWarning.text: Your Changemappers account will become inactive in {{days}} days. Sign in or use Changemappers before {{date}} to keep it active: {{url}}

inactivityFinal.subject: Your Changemappers account is inactive: export window is open
inactivityFinal.title: Your account is now inactive
inactivityFinal.intro: Your Changemappers account has reached 180 days without authenticated activity and is now marked inactive.
inactivityFinal.exportWindow: You can export your data for another 30 days. If there is no activity before {{date}}, your account and personal data will be erased.
inactivityFinal.copyUrl: Or copy this URL into your browser:
inactivityFinal.text: Your Changemappers account is inactive. You can export your data for another 30 days: {{exportUrl}}. If there is no activity before {{date}}, your account and personal data will be erased. Reactivate here: {{accountUrl}}

lean.title: Confirm your email - Changemappers
lean.heading: Confirm your email
lean.body: Continue only if you opened this link yourself. This extra step protects your registration from automatic email scanners.
lean.notice: After confirmation, your browser will continue to the profile step using a secure registration cookie.

full.title: Confirm your email - Changemappers
full.heading: Confirm your email
full.body: Continue only if you opened this link yourself. This extra step protects your full registration from automatic email scanners.
full.notice: After confirmation, your browser will continue to account details using a secure registration cookie.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app. Strongly recommended — and required for admins and moderators.

twoFactor.backupCodesLabel: Save these backup codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose your device.

errors.invalidCode: That code is not valid. Please try again.
